pages.text: $(l)Laziness$()$(br)A stacking self-debuff. Each stack reduces attack speed and attack damage by 5%.
$(l)Sloth Weakness$()$(br)An enemy debuff that reduces attack speed and attack damage by 30%.
$(l)Heavy Stun$()$(br)A near-root. Movement speed is reduced by 95%.
$(l)Martyr's Claim$()$(br)The stacking mark used by Nail of the First Martyr. Repeated hits build it on one target.
$(l)Judged$()$(br)The execution state created once Martyr's Claim reaches full stacks. Killing a Judged target rewards the attacker with Haste and Absorption.
